{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Silverfangs
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] has the benefit of meat from the [[Silverfangs]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
